Package org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.mapOvrG

Class MapOvrGoalImpl

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.mapOvrG.MapOvrGoalImpl
public class MapOvrGoalImpl extends Object
Common implementation for MapOvrGoal reasoner and tactic.

      private Expression relation(int tag, Expression left, Expression right)

    • checkGoal

      public boolean checkGoal()
      Returns true iff the goal is in the right form, false else.

    • findNeededHyp

      public Predicate findNeededHyp()
      Returns, if it exists among hypotheses of the sequent, the predicate that allows to infer a part of the goal, else returns null.

    • infersGoal

      public boolean infersGoal(Predicate predicate)
      Returns true iff the given predicate allow to infers a part of the goal, false else.

    • createSubgoals

      public Predicate[] createSubgoals()
      Returns an array of predicate containing exactly two elements.
